pattern_preferences.reason: The console uses one approved shell composition around canonical Salt navigation and layout primitives.
Dashboard filter bars are standardized as one page-level pattern with fixed control ordering.

banned_choices.name: UNSTABLE_SaltProviderNext
banned_choices.reason: The repo only supports the stable provider stack.

notes: Pattern preferences should narrow canonical Salt guidance, not replace Salt primitives with unrelated custom UI.
Keep canonical Salt rationale visible alongside project pattern names.
